en: Take damage equal to stacks at the start of your turn. Then stacks are halved (rounded down).
zh: 每回合开始时受到等同层数的伤害。然后层数减半（向下取整）。

en: Take damage equal to stacks at the end of your turn. Lose 1 stack at the start of each turn.
zh: 每回合结束时受到等同层数的伤害。每回合开始时层数 -1。

en: Outgoing attack damage reduced 25% per stack. Decays 1 per turn.
zh: 每层使造成的攻击伤害降低 25%。每回合衰减 1 层。

en: Incoming attack damage increased 50% per stack. Decays 1 per turn.
zh: 每层使受到的攻击伤害提高 50%。每回合衰减 1 层。

en: Next N attacks deal double damage. Consumed on use.
zh: 接下来 N 次攻击造成双倍伤害。使用后消耗。

en: Enemy skips its next turn for each stack (enemy-only).
zh: 每层使敌人跳过其下一回合（仅敌人）。

en: Heal stacks HP at the start of your turn. Stacks decay by 1 each turn.
zh: 每回合开始时回复等同层数的生命值。每回合衰减 1 层。

en: When hit by an attack, the attacker takes stacks damage. Persistent.
zh: 被攻击命中时，攻击者受到等同层数的伤害。持续存在。

en: Block gained is reduced 25%. Decays 1 per turn.
zh: 获得的格挡降低 25%。每回合衰减 1 层。

en: Completely negates incoming attacks, one stack consumed per attack.
zh: 完全抵消受到的攻击，每次攻击消耗一层。
攻击 — 造成 {n} 点伤害
攻击 — 造成 {n} 点伤害并施加 {status} {k}
防御 — 获得 {n} 点格挡
治疗 — 回复 {n} 点生命
增益 — 正在强化自身

en: At the start of your turn gain Block equal to stacks. Persistent.
zh: 每回合开始获得等同层数的格挡。持续。

en: Whenever a card is Exhausted gain Block equal to stacks. Persistent.
zh: 每当一张牌被消耗时获得等同层数的格挡。持续。

en: Whenever a card is Exhausted draw cards equal to stacks. Persistent.
zh: 每当一张牌被消耗时抽取等同层数的牌。持续。
